nasb.text: Then Noah and his sons and his wife and his sons’ wives with him entered the ark because of the water of the flood.

esv.text: And Noah and his sons and his wife and his sons’ wives with him went into the ark to escape the waters of the flood.

cnv.text: 挪亞帶著他的兒子、妻子和兒媳一同進了方舟，躲避洪水。

ccb.text: 挪亚与妻子、儿子们和儿媳们都进了方舟，躲避洪水。

csbs.text: 挪亚与他的儿子们、他的妻子和儿媳们一起进入方舟，躲避大洪水。
